description: Grounding evals for OmniPro Expert. Tiers: sample (the challenge README's own questions), fact (single-node retrieval), trap (designed to elicit hallucination), multihop (requires edge traversal), ambiguous (must ask a clarifying question), scope (must decline), visual (must show the right visual).

questions.q: What's the duty cycle for MIG welding at 200A on 240V?
I'm getting porosity in my flux-cored welds. What should I check?
What polarity setup do I need for TIG? Which socket does the ground clamp go in?
What's the MIG duty cycle at 100 amps if I'm running on a regular 120V outlet?
What's the maximum open circuit voltage of this welder?
What's the wire feed speed range?
What's the stick welding amperage range on 240V?
What flux-cored wire sizes does this machine take?
What does duty cycle actually mean?
What materials can I TIG weld with this?
How big a wire spool fits in this welder?
Can I TIG weld aluminum with this welder?

notRegex: yes,? you can TIG weld aluminum
